sources.note: Marriage to Mary Follet, May 4, 1755, Danvers, Essex County MA

notes: Father of Naomi Tewksbury. Baptized March 7, 1729/30. Parents: Jonathan Tewksbury (1695-) and Mary Prideaux (1699-1776). Married Mary Follet on May 4, 1755 in Danvers, Essex County, MA. Children: Susannah (1759-1842), Naomi (1770, born in New Hampshire). Died November 12, 1775 in Manchester, Essex, MA — just months before the Declaration of Independence. Naomi was only 5 when her father died.
